inline_comments: Reads EXIF orientation from JPEG buffer. Returns orientation value 1-8, or null if not found/not JPEG. EXIF orientation values: 1 = Normal, 2 = Flip H, 3 = Rotate 180, 4 = Flip V, 5 = Rotate 270 CW + Flip H, 6 = Rotate 90 CW, 7 = Rotate 90 CW + Flip H, 8 = Rotate 270 CW
Check JPEG magic bytes
Look for marker
Skip padding FF bytes
APP1 marker (EXIF)
Check for "Exif\0\0" header
Check byte order (II = little-endian, MM = big-endian)
Read IFD0 offset
Orientation tag = 0x0112
Skip other segments
SOF, SOS, or other marker - stop searching
Applies rotation/flip to image buffer using sips based on EXIF orientation.
Map EXIF orientation to sips operations
sips -r rotates clockwise, -f flips (horizontal/vertical)
Orientation 1 or unknown - no change needed
Normalizes EXIF orientation in an image buffer. Returns the buffer with correct pixel orientation (rotated if needed). Falls back to original buffer if normalization fails.
.rotate() with no args auto-rotates based on EXIF orientation
Sharp not available or failed - return original buffer
Normalize EXIF orientation BEFORE resizing (sips resize doesn't auto-rotate)
Avoid enlarging by checking dimensions first (sips has no withoutEnlargement flag).
Use .rotate() BEFORE .resize() to auto-rotate based on EXIF orientation
Checks if an image has an alpha channel (transparency). Returns true if the image has alpha, false otherwise.
Check if the image has an alpha channel
PNG color types with alpha: 4 (grayscale+alpha), 6 (RGBA)
Sharp reports this via 'channels' (4 = RGBA) or 'hasAlpha'
Resizes an image to PNG format, preserving alpha channel (transparency). Falls back to sharp only (no sips fallback for PNG with alpha).
Compression level 6 is a good balance (0=fastest, 9=smallest)
Try a grid of sizes/compression levels until under the limit.
PNG uses compression levels 0-9 (higher = smaller but slower).
Continue trying other size/compression combinations.
Internal sips-only EXIF normalization (no sharp fallback). Used by resizeToJpeg to normalize before sips resize.

functions.name: readJpegExifOrientation
functions.doc: Reads EXIF orientation from JPEG buffer.   Returns orientation value 1-8, or null if not found JPEG.     EXIF orientatio

functions.name: sipsApplyOrientation
functions.doc: Applies rotation to image buffer using sips based on EXIF orientation.

functions.name: normalizeExifOrientation
functions.doc: Normalizes EXIF orientation in an image buffer.   Returns the buffer with correct pixel orientation (rotated if needed).

functions.name: hasAlphaChannel
functions.doc: Checks if an image has an alpha channel (transparency).   Returns true if the image has alpha, false otherwise.

functions.name: resizeToPng
functions.doc: Resizes an image to PNG format, preserving alpha channel (transparency).   Falls back to sharp only (no sips fallback fo

functions.name: normalizeExifOrientationSips
functions.doc: Internal sips-only EXIF normalization (no sharp fallback).   Used by resizeToJpeg to normalize before sips resize.
